name: fanatical-prospecting
description: 14 skills for outbound prospecting, pipeline filling, and sales conversation opening, extracted from Fanatical Prospecting by Jeb Blount

skills.name: prospecting-objective-setter
skills.description: Define measurable prospecting objectives by converting revenue targets into daily activity numbers — calls, emails, connections, and appointments — using pipeline math and conversion rate analysis.

skills.name: prospect-list-tiering
skills.description: Score and segment a prospect list into A, B, and C tiers by applying fit criteria — budget, authority, need, and timeline — so prospecting time is allocated to the highest-probability opportunities first.

skills.name: prospecting-ratio-manager
skills.description: Calculate and manage prospecting conversion ratios — dials to contacts, contacts to conversations, conversations to appointments — to identify bottlenecks and set realistic activity targets.

skills.name: prospecting-time-block-planner
skills.description: Design a protected prospecting time-block schedule that prevents interruptions and ensures daily minimum prospecting activity is completed regardless of competing demands.

skills.name: prospecting-message-crafter
skills.description: Craft channel-optimized prospecting messages — cold call openers, email subject lines and bodies, LinkedIn connection requests, and text messages — that open conversations without pitching.

skills.name: call-reluctance-diagnostic
skills.description: Diagnose the specific type of call reluctance affecting prospecting behavior — fear of rejection, perfectionism, role rejection, or social self-consciousness — and prescribe a targeted behavioral intervention.

skills.name: balanced-prospecting-cadence-designer
skills.description: Design a multi-channel prospecting cadence that allocates daily activity across phone, email, social, text, and in-person touches to reduce channel dependency and maximize pipeline coverage.

skills.name: cold-call-opener-builder
skills.description: Build a cold call opener that passes the first seven seconds — using interruption pattern, relevance bridge, and disruptive question — to earn permission to continue the conversation.

skills.name: cold-email-writer
skills.description: Write cold prospecting emails with subject line, opening hook, value bridge, and single call-to-action — optimized for reply rate, not click rate — using the RBO (Relevance, Brevity, One ask) framework.

skills.name: social-selling-touch-planner
skills.description: Plan a LinkedIn social-selling touch sequence — profile view, content engagement, connection request, and message — that warms a prospect before direct outreach without looking like spam.

skills.name: in-person-prospecting-route-planner
skills.description: Plan an in-person prospecting route — clustering visits by geography, tier, and call objective — to maximize face-to-face touches per hour and convert geographic density into pipeline activity.

skills.name: text-prospecting-sequence-builder
skills.description: Build a compliant text prospecting sequence — initial message, follow-up, and opt-out handling — optimized for high open rates and appointment setting without triggering spam filters.

skills.name: gatekeeper-navigator
skills.description: Navigate gatekeepers — receptionists, assistants, and office managers — using respect-based rapport and legitimate business framing to reach the decision maker without deception or confrontation.

skills.name: prospecting-objection-handler
skills.description: Handle the five most common prospecting objections — 'not interested', 'already have a vendor', 'send me information', 'no budget', 'call me later' — using the ledge-and-bridge technique to keep the conversation alive.

minimal.description: Hub skill plus two essentials — message crafting foundation and call opener for immediate outreach

core.description: 7 highest-value skills — full prospecting toolkit covering objectives, list management, ratios, outreach, and objection handling

full.description: All 14 skills — complete outbound prospecting system covering every channel and scenario
